name: Elemental Relic
description: The Elemental Relic is a common Eridian relic in Borderlands 2.
notes: Its bonus overlaps with the Bone of the Ancients, which effectively pairs an elemental damage boost with an elemental proficiency bonus.

special.description: Boosts damage for a single elemental type. At Overpower levels, the bonus can reach up to 38%.
